# terrible_community_general_heroku_collaborator (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `apps` (String) List of Heroku App names.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `user` (String) User ID or e-mail.

### Optional

- `api_key` (String) Heroku API key.
- `state` (String) Create or remove the heroku collaborator.
- `suppress_invitation` (Boolean) Suppress email invitation when creating collaborator.
